title: Add them all up
prompt: Write sum_to(n) that returns 1 + 2 + ... + n using a loop. sum_to(5) is 15. If n is 0 or less, return 0.

details.restate: Add up every whole number from 1 to n and give back the total. If n is 0 or negative, there's nothing to add — the answer is 0.

help.plain: Keep a running total, and add each number from 1 up to n into it.
help.analogy: Stacking coins into a pile — you keep the pile going and drop one more on each turn.
help.nudge: What value should `total` start at BEFORE the loop begins?
